headline: LTL carriers report gains in shipment weights
summary: “[D]emand has continued to improve as the quarter has progressed,” CEO and President Kevin “Marty” Freeman said in a statement.

headline: Forward Air vs. Old Dominion Freight Line: Which Industrials Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: One logistics leader boasts a debt-free balance sheet and robust margins, while the other trades at a deep discount but faces mounting financial pressures.
